titleStmt.title: SII 38.112: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 112. (A.R. No. 112 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and unfinished. Engraved in small letters. It begins with the usual meykīrtti of the king Pugaḻ śūḻnda puṇari. It records the provision made by Paḷḷikoṇḍāṇ Rāmadēvaṉ alias Irumuḍiśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷār, a native of Śiṟṟāmūr in Vaṇḍāḻaivēḷūr-kkūṟṟam (a sub-division of) Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, for meeting the expenses on the day of the procession of the deity, Rishabhamēṟi Viṇṇāḷār at the temple in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam alias Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu (a sub-division of) Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, on the occasion of festival. The provision included the decoration of the image of the deity by the application of unguents, for providing food offerings to the God and supply of food to the musicians, and dancers participating in the festival and devotees, who assembled to worship the god on that occasion. Provision was also made for honouring the person who got ready image of the Rishabhā, the vehicle for the festival. For meeting the expenses on these accounts the donor purchased some lands from the sabhā of Maṇali alias Śiṅgavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyiṟ poṉṉemi yaḷavun=taṉṉemi naṭa
ppa viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai yiḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāṟ pu
tu maṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayil nuṇaikku kulavi
koṅkaṇar puṟatar vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit teṉticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumai
yum poṉṉiyāṭaiyum naṉṉilappāvaiyu n=taṉimaiyu[ n=tavira] vantu putaṟṟiru maṇi makuṭamu
rimaiyil cūṭi tannaṭi yiraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭi muṭiyākat toṉṉila ventarcūṭi muṉṉai manuvāṟu
k kaliyānu vuṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yiru nilavaḷāka meṅkaṇu
n=tatu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa voru tani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vār kaṭaṟṟi vān=tarattu pūpālar
ceri kaḷi muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karun=talai parun=talait ti
puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa muṉṉāṭ piṟ kulappiṟai pol ni
letir koṭiṟṟallatu taṉ kai villetir koṭāveḻkula
yiliṭṭa kaḷiṟṟiṉt tiṭṭamum paṭṭa veṅkariyum viṭṭa taṉmānamuṅ
ṉ vīramuṅ kūṭiyya Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa viḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭai
toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalun=talai virittalamāka kuṭaticait taṉṉāḷukantu tāṉu tāṉaiyu
paṉṉāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payantetir māṟiya Aimporun=tiruvum paḻiyuka
koṭutta pukaḻiṉ celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ kaṇ[ maṭantai] yariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta
kaṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇameṉṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭu moruvicaik kaik ko
ṇṭaṇṭiya pukaḻoṭum pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷat tiruvuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittaraṅkaḷum porkarittaṟ
tiraṅkaḻu tan=taravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal teṉkaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ peruñceṉaiyai ye
vip pañcavaraivarum poruta poykaḷattañci veru neḷit toṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭ
ṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟcai veñcura meṟṟi koṟṟa vicaiyastayampat ticai to
ṟu niṟutti muttiṉ cilāpamum muttamiṭ potiyilu mattaveṅkaripaṭu vaiyyac caiyyamum kaṉṉiyuṅ
kaik koṇṭaruḷit teṉṉāṭṭellai kāṭṭi kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟallān=tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiy taṉ
Oru tanit talaivaraik kuṟukalarkulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷ veṅkai maṇṭa
laṅ kaṭantu kalimkameḻuṅ kanaleri parappi pol vilaṅkiya ven=tar viṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟṟoṭu paṭṭu mu
ṉ puraḷap poru kopattuṭaṉ porumuka patiravaru komaṭṭai mātava netir paṭ ye(n)ṅkarākaṉ Ikaviceṇaṉ mā
n piṟaḻā matikkari yirāyaṇaṉ taṇṭāṟpatiyiṉ tani ceṉāpati maṇṭalikkaramayaṉ Eṇmart ticaipukaḻ kettaya
ṉ ceruccenāpati taccakar rā ṇa vallaṇaṉ peṟṟa vaḻittoṭum paṭṭa maṟṟavar karun=talaiyāṭa veṇṇiṉa
k kaḷiṟṟuṭappiṉ ṟicaiyeṅkaṇum pāttaliluyarntu paḻaṅkaṭalaṭaiyttu tarātalam kurutiyiṉ putukaṭaloṉṟu
ṅ kaṇṭu maṟiyattuṭaṉ maṉṉavaṉ Aim teviyatāṉaṅ keṭṭu malai maṉu yu
micai Iḻin=ta virittuk kaṅkai viṟṟirunṭeṉa
ṟeṇṭicait tāmum kaḷiṟṟo teṉṉanavarkki niṟai koḷāra mun=tiruppumt taliṅkalum pola viramu n=tiyākamum
viḷaṅkappār toḻaccivaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭaṉ kaṅkai[ vīṟṟirun=ta]
(nta)ruḷiya kovirā[ja]kesaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muppatteḻāvatu [jayaṅko]
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa rājendracoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu puḻalnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟi Ūruṭaiyār koyilil paṭampa
kkanāyakar teva tirunāḷil piṟṟai nāḷ Iṣabhameṟi viṇṇāḷaṉukku Eḻun=taruḷum
tirumaiyppūccum tiruvamutum Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvana vaiṟṟukkum caṭṭiccoṟukkum It tirunāḷ cevikkum śrī mā
yeśvararkkun Āṭinārkkum pāṭinārkkum Apūrvikaḷukkum cevittārkkum Iṟṟai nāḷ Aruḷu Iṣabhadevaṉ Eḻun=taruḷu
vippāṉukkum paricaṭṭaṅ kuṭukka veṇṭuvana vaiyṟṟukku coḻamaṇṭalattu coḻavaḷanāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻai ve
ḷurk kūṟṟattu ciṟṟāmur Ūruṭaiyāṉ paḷḷikoṇṭāṉ Irāmatevanāṉa Irumuṭicoḻamuven=taveḷār Ittevar tevatāṉam
puḻaṟ koṭṭamāna rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puḻalnāṭṭu maṇaliyāna ciṅkaviṣṇaccaruppeti maṅkalattu [ sabhai]
yār pakkal kācum ṭṭuk koṇṭuviṭṭa nilam Ivvūril vatāra viṭṭa
pāṟ kellai paṭiyūraṉ ceyyukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ivvūreṟiya pon kku vaṭakkum
parāntakaṉvatikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Oṭakālukku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkum naṭuvuṭ
cāṇkolālIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
